message:
fix(web/cors): prevent CRLF injection via reflected Origin header

CorsMiddleware::apply_common_headers() used resp.headers.insert()
directly, bypassing sanitize_header_value(). A malicious Origin
header containing CR/LF could inject arbitrary response headers.

Fixed by routing all CORS response headers through set_header()
which calls sanitize_header_value() to strip CR/LF characters.

Other header insertion sites (preflight allow-methods/headers,
request-id, set-response-header) verified safe: either use
server-controlled values or pre-sanitize client input.

Also records 8-file web framework + Cx/scope audit (all SOUND).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
